title: Task: In the Happy.app repository, inspect implementation and tests to identify likely unfinished areas or gaps. Return: 1) current implemented features, 2) missing/broken/incomplete parts inferred from code/tests, 3) verification risks. Do not edit files. Focus on local workspace only. Mention conc...
summary_text: 1. **Implemented features in `happy-web`** - Mobile shell with 4 screens (`home/work/live/recover`), task detail sheet, event stream, sync status/actions, and recovery controls in [index.html](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/apps/happy-web/index.html) and [src/app.js](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/apps/happy-web/src/app.js). - Local-first intake queue with idempotency, offline persistence, queue capacity guard, and recovery-action queueing in [src/adapters/happy-app-intake.js](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/apps/happy-web/src/adapters/happy-app-intake.js). - Event-sourced state adapter: optimistic local events, remote feed sync (`eventsEndpoint`), snapshot fallback (`stateEndpoint`), task-detail incremental sync cursor, recovery dedupe in [src/adapters/happy-app-state.js](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/apps/happy-web/src/adapters/happy-app-state.js), [src/domain/happy-event-store.js](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/apps/happy-web/src/domain/happy-event-store.js), [src/domain/happy-state-projector.js](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/apps/happy-web/src/domain/happy-state-projector.js). - Auth stale/re-entry model and gateway UI (return-to sanitization, access/password modes) in [src/domain/happy-auth-reentry.js](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/apps/happy-web/src/domain/happy-auth-reentry.js), [src/domain/happy-auth-gateway.js](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/apps/happy-web/src/domain/happy-auth-gateway.js), [auth/auth.js](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/apps/happy-web/auth/auth.js), [auth/index.html](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/apps/happy-web/auth/index.html). - Auth token refresh + multi-tab lock coordination (`navigator.locks` + storage/BroadcastChannel fallback) in [src/adapters/happy-endpoint-client.js](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/apps/happy-web/src/adapters/happy-endpoint-client.js). - PWA shell + SW caching policy in [manifest.webmanifest](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/apps/happy-web/manifest.webmanifest) and [sw.js](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/apps/happy-web/sw.js). 2. **Likely missing / broken / incomplete parts (from code + tests)** - SW precache is partial: `sw.js` precaches only a few JS files, but app boot imports many additional modules (`src/adapters/*`, `src/domain/*`); first offline load can miss those modules ([sw.js](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/apps/happy-web/sw.js), [src/kernel-state.js](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/apps/happy-web/src/kernel-state.js)). - Runtime error visibility is weak: major failures are swallowed (`boot().catch(() => {})`, `serviceWorker.register(...).catch(() => {})`) in [src/app.js](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/apps/happy-web/src/app.js). - Test suite portability is incomplete: many tests hardcode absolute machine path `/Users/masayuki/...` (all files under [tests](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/apps/happy-web/tests)). - README verification list is incomplete vs actual tests (omits `test-endpoint-client.js` and `test-event-store-compaction.js`) in [README.md](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/apps/happy-web/README.md). - `test-endpoint-client.js` exits by status but prints no explicit PASS marker unlike other tests, reducing CI/operator observability ([tests/test-endpoint-client.js](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/apps/happy-web/tests/test-endpoint-client.js)). 3. **Verification risks** - UI behavior coverage is shallow for a large UI controller (`src/app.js` is 1220 lines): shell tests are mostly grep-based contract checks, not browser interaction/state transition tests ([tests/test-view-contract.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/apps/happy-web/tests/test-view-contract.sh), [tests/test-state-contract.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/apps/happy-web/tests/test-state-contract.sh), [tests/test-design-contract.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/apps/happy-web/tests/test-design-contract.sh)). - No real browse...
